description: Write a python script to reverse a string.
Create a simple FastAPI server with one endpoint that returns JSON data.
Write a Python function to flatten a nested list to any depth.
Implement a binary search function in Python with proper type hints.
Create a Python class for a stack data structure with push, pop, peek, and is_empty methods.
Write a Python async function that fetches data from multiple URLs concurrently using aiohttp.
Implement a Python LRU cache decorator without using functools.lru_cache.
Write a Python script to parse CSV files and compute per-column statistics (mean, median, std).
Create a Python context manager for timing code blocks that logs elapsed time to a file.
Write a Python function to validate email addresses using only the re module.
Implement a Python generator that yields fixed-size chunks from a large iterable.
Create a Python decorator that retries a function up to N times on specified exceptions with exponential backoff.
Write a Python CLI tool using argparse that reads a JSON file and outputs it as formatted CSV.
Implement a thread-safe singleton pattern in Python using a metaclass.

Write a Python function that parses and computes arithmetic expressions (+ - * / parentheses) from a string, implementing a proper recursive descent parser instead of relying on Python's built-in expression evaluation.
Create a Python dataclass-based config loader that merges values from a YAML file and environment variables, with env vars taking precedence.
Write a Python script using watchdog that monitors a directory for file creation and modification events and logs them.
Implement a basic HTTP GET and POST client in Python using only the standard library urllib.
Write pytest unit tests for a function that sorts a list of dictionaries by a specified key, covering edge cases.
Write a Python function to generate all permutations of a string without using itertools.
Implement a simple tokenizer in Python that classifies text into words, numbers, and punctuation tokens.
Create a Python class for a doubly linked list with insert, delete, and forward/backward traversal methods.
Write a Python async context manager for a database connection pool that enforces a max connection limit.
Implement Dijkstra's algorithm in Python for finding shortest paths in a weighted directed graph represented as an adjacency list.
Write a Python script to extract product names and prices from an HTML string using BeautifulSoup.
Create a Python function that validates a dictionary against a provided JSON schema definition using the jsonschema library.
Write a Python template renderer that replaces {{variable}} placeholders in a string with values from a dictionary.
Implement a thread-safe in-memory key-value store in Python with TTL expiration and a background cleanup thread.
Write pytest fixtures for setting up and tearing down a SQLite test database, including table creation and seed data.
Write a Python function to merge multiple sorted iterables into a single sorted list using a min-heap.
Write a Dockerfile for a basic Node.js application.
Write a docker-compose.yml for a Python FastAPI app with a PostgreSQL database and Redis cache, including health checks.
Create a Makefile with targets for install, test, lint, build, and clean for a Python project.
Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs pytest on push to main and on pull requests.
Create a bash script that backs up a PostgreSQL database to an S3 bucket with 7-day retention rotation.
Write an nginx configuration for a reverse proxy with SSL termination, gzip compression, and rate limiting.
Create a Terraform module for an AWS S3 bucket with versioning, server-side encryption, and a lifecycle rule to expire objects after 90 days.
Write a Kubernetes Deployment manifest for a containerized Python API with 3 replicas, resource requests/limits, and a liveness probe.
Write a crontab entry and wrapper bash script that runs a Python cleanup job every Sunday at 3 AM and logs output.
Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds a Docker image, tags it with the git SHA, and pushes it to Amazon ECR.
Create a Kubernetes ConfigMap for application configuration and a Secret for database credentials, both referenced in a Deployment.
Write a bash healthcheck script that verifies three HTTP service endpoints return 200 OK within 2 seconds and sends an alert email on failure.
Create a Terraform resource block for an AWS Lambda function with an execution IAM role, CloudWatch log group, and environment variables from SSM Parameter Store.
Write a docker-compose.override.yml for local development that adds hot-reload, exposes debug ports, and mounts source code as a volume.
Create a Kubernetes HorizontalPodAutoscaler manifest that scales a deployment between 2 and 10 replicas based on 70% CPU utilization.
Write a bash log rotation script that compresses application logs older than 7 days and deletes compressed archives older than 30 days.
Create an AWS CDK stack in Python that provisions a DynamoDB table with a GSI, pay-per-request billing, and auto-scaling.
Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs Trivy vulnerability scanning on a Docker image and fails the build on HIGH or CRITICAL findings.
Create a Kubernetes PodDisruptionBudget that ensures at least 2 pods are always available, and a NetworkPolicy that restricts ingress to pods in the same namespace.
Write a bash bootstrap script for a new developer environment that installs Python deps, creates a .env from .env.example, and runs database migrations.
Write a README.md for a Python CLI tool that converts CSV files to JSON, including installation instructions, usage examples, and a feature list.
Create an OpenAPI 3.0 YAML spec for a REST API with endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting user records.
Write Google-style docstrings for a Python class that manages database connections, covering the class, __init__, and all public methods.
Write a CHANGELOG.md entry for a v2.1.0 release that includes three new features, two bug fixes, and one breaking change.
Write an Architecture Decision Record (ADR) for choosing PostgreSQL over MongoDB as the primary data store for a multi-tenant SaaS application.
Create a runbook for diagnosing and resolving high API latency in a Python FastAPI service, covering common causes and remediation steps.
Write an incident response runbook for a database connection pool exhaustion event, including detection, triage, mitigation, and post-mortem steps.
Create a new developer onboarding guide for a Python microservices project using Docker Compose, covering setup, local development, and common workflows.
Write a code review checklist for Python pull requests covering security vulnerabilities, performance pitfalls, test coverage, and style guidelines.
Write a migration guide for upgrading a Python application from 3.9 to 3.12, covering deprecated features, breaking changes, and new capabilities to adopt.
Summarize a list of git commit messages into a concise weekly changelog for a web application release.
Write CLI help text and usage examples for a command-line database migration tool with init, up, down, and status subcommands.
Write clear, user-friendly error messages for a form validation library covering required field, invalid format, and out-of-range value scenarios.
Write a pull request description for a change that adds per-route rate limiting middleware to an existing REST API.
Write five example commit messages following the Conventional Commits specification for a feature branch that adds user authentication.
Create a minimal Flask web app with a SQLAlchemy User model, a /users CRUD REST API (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE), and pytest tests for all endpoints.
Build a FastAPI service with a Pydantic request/response schema, a /predict endpoint that calls a stub ML model, and error handling middleware.
Create a TypeScript module for date range formatting with type definitions, implementation, and Jest unit tests covering edge cases.
Build a React pagination component with a usePagination custom hook, a Pagination UI component, and a Storybook story showing default and edge-case states.
Create a Python package with an __init__.py that exposes a public API, a core.py module with business logic, and a utils.py module with helper functions.
Build a Python CLI tool using click with a config.py module for settings, and import/export subcommands each with their own options and help text.
Create a data pipeline with separate ingest.py, transform.py, and load.py modules, each with typed function signatures and a pipeline.py orchestrator.
Build a REST API client with an auth.py module for token management, an endpoints.py wrapper for common operations, and a retry.py module with exponential backoff.
Create a job queue system with a queue.py producer using Redis lists, a worker.py consumer with graceful shutdown, and a scheduler.py for cron-based job registration.
Write SQLAlchemy ORM models for a blog application (Post, Comment, Tag with many-to-many) and an Alembic migration script for the initial schema.
Create JWT authentication middleware with a guards.py module for token validation, a roles.py decorator for role-based access control, and unit tests.
Build a simple event system with an EventPublisher, EventSubscriber, and EventBus class for decoupled in-process pub/sub communication.
Create a configuration management system with a YAML schema validator, a ConfigLoader class, and environment variable override support.
Build a plugin registry with a PluginBase abstract class, a PluginLoader that discovers plugins from a directory, and two example plugin implementations.
Create a Python argparse CLI with three subcommands (init, run, status), each with their own arguments, help text, and handler functions in separate modules.
